name: monkez-file-manager-root
description: Root package for Monkez File Manager

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.package: npm run build:frontend && npx pkg backend --out-path dist
scripts.package:electron: npm run build:frontend && npx electron-packager . "Monkez File Manager" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist-electron-release --icon=icon.ico --overwrite --prune=true --ignore="^/dist-electron-release|^/dist-electron|^/frontend/node_modules|^/backend/node_modules|^/frontend/src|^/dist|^/\.git"
